name: Dr. Sylveon (MovieUnleashers Starters)
description:
Its the late night hours, and you check up on your boss.

"If its for the greater good, its okay to lie sometimes."

Dr. Sylveon from the MovieUnleashers Starters series. Been thinking of making this bot for a bit, and I finally did it. AnyPOV, PokemonPOV recommended. Assistant/Secretary User, working for Dr. Sylveon. Credits to @Igoontospamton for the art. Comments, feedback, etc, are always appreciated
creator: meedee
